coreCompetencies: Basic understanding of confidentiality, integrity and availability
Elementary knowledge of common vulnerability classes and how they arise
Ability to run a vulnerability scanner and read its output
Basic understanding of authentication and authorization models
Ability to document security findings clearly
Elementary understanding of encryption in transit and at rest
Ability to apply basic system hardening from a checklist
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with security frameworks such as NIST and CIS benchmarks
Elementary understanding of networking and firewalls
Basic familiarity with identity and access concepts
indicators: Requires close supervision on security tasks
Executes documented hardening and scanning procedures
Learning core platform security concepts

Ability to track remediation of known vulnerabilities
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with secrets management tooling
Understanding of cloud security fundamentals
Basic familiarity with security logging for later analysis
indicators: Performs security assessments with supervision
Applies standard platform security controls
Coordinates simple remediation with system owners

indicators: Designs platform security controls for projects
